svg.title: Deployment Architecture for Market Expansion Intelligence Agent
svg.desc: Multi-layer architecture showing React frontend, FastAPI backend with MCP server, and external APIs with deployment options.

text.style: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; fill: var(--color-text-primary);;fill:rgb(250, 249, 245);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

g.text: Vite • Input form • Results display • Reasoning chain
Rate limiting (5 req/min) • API key auth • CORS validation
Deployment: AWS Lambda / Cloud Run / Docker
Zero network access • Isolated subprocess • Timeout constraints
Rate limiting per IP • CORS locked to frontend domain • MCP subprocess isolated • API key auth • Secrets via environment variables
